customer360.title: Customer 360
customer360.subtitle: Customer summary and activities
customer360.error: An error occurred while loading the summary

INCREASE_ACTIVITY_CADENCE.title: Increase your activity pace
INCREASE_ACTIVITY_CADENCE.reason: There are only 2 activities in the last 7 days.

explain.revenueQualityTitle: Revenue quality scores are calculated rule-based from the last 12 months of order/quote/activity data; Includes cohort, retention, RFM, LTV, churn, upsell and payment metrics.
explain.churnRisk: Churn Risk; It is calculated as 0-100 with the last order day, last activity day and last 12 months order frequency signals. A higher score means a higher risk of loss.
explain.upsellPropensity: Upsell Propensity; It is calculated as 0-100 with the order quantity, quote-to-order conversion rate and average order amount signals. A high score means a sales opportunity.
explain.paymentBehavior: Payment Behavior is currently calculated 0-100 with proxy signals (order continuity, bid rejection rate, last order recency) instead of ERP collection history.
explain.rfmSegment: RFM Segment; Generates Champion/Loyal/AtRisk/Potential class according to recency, frequency and monetary rules.
explain.cohortRetentionTitle: Cohort Retention considers the month of first contact/order as cohort; If there are orders in the following months, it counts retained and produces a monthly retention percentage.
explain.recommendedActionsTitle: Recommended Actions are priority follow-up suggestions produced by the rules engine (e.g. no activity for a long time, there is an open offer, churn is high). Each action can be tracked with justification + rule code.
explain.executeAction: Execute translates this suggestion into an activity/task: the backend `POST /api/customer360/{id}/actions/execute` is called and a new Activity record is created.
explain.noCohortData: Cohort data has not been created yet because there is not enough order history.
explain.modelNote: Note: These scores are deterministic v1; In the future, ERP collection data will be developed with quota/forecast and ML models.

salesman360.title: Sales Representative 360
salesman360.subtitle: Sales representative summary
salesman360.error: An error occurred while loading the summary

INCREASE_ACTIVITY_CADENCE.title: Increase your activity pace
INCREASE_ACTIVITY_CADENCE.reason: There are only 2 activities in the last 7 days.

explain.revenueQualityTitle: Scores are calculated rule-based from the sales representative's portfolio/order/activity performance over the last 12 months; Includes cohort, retention, RFM, LTV, churn, upsell and payment metrics.
explain.churnRisk: Portfolio Churn Risk; 0-100 is calculated according to the ratio of active customers and customers who have become inactive in the last 90 days.
explain.upsellPropensity: Upsell Propensity; Calculated 0-100 with order density, number of bids won and activity tempo signals.
explain.paymentBehavior: Payment Behavior is currently calculated with proxy metrics; It becomes more accurate when directly linked to ERP collection history.
explain.rfmSegment: RFM Segment gives classification according to the recency/frequency/monetary behavior of the portfolio.
explain.cohortRetentionTitle: Cohort Retention cohorts the customers in the representative portfolio according to the first order month and shows the monthly retention rate.
explain.recommendedActionsTitle: Recommended Actions recommend priority actions such as pipeline cleaning, activity increase and churn intervention. Each action can be tracked with justification + rule code.
explain.executeAction: Execute translates the suggestion into the activity/task record: the backend `POST /api/salesmen360/{userId}/actions/execute` is called.
explain.noCohortData: Cohort data has not been created yet because there is not enough order history.
explain.modelNote: Note: Current scores are deterministic v1; It can be strengthened by adding quota/forecast/ML.
